modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Printer is not printing in color despite being a color printer.

full_description_text: The user is having trouble with their new color printer. They say it does not print in color at all. There seems to be some error about incompatible print settings, but they are not sure what that means. The printer was set up this spring, and now it just prints in black and white.
short_description: Printer is not printing in color despite being a color printer.
description: The user is having trouble with their new color printer. They say it does not print in color at all. There seems to be some error about incompatible print settings, but they are not sure what that means. The printer was set up this spring, and now it just prints in black and white.
